## SHI - About the company

SHI is an early stage company based in Alhambra (United States), founded in 1994 by [Koguan Leo](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/people/5a9cc0f7e4b09e59b4fffa10/koguanleo) . It operates as a SHI – Computer Software, Hardware and Managed IT Solutions - Home. SHI has raised $670K in funding. The company has 1697 active competitors, including 6 funded and 125 that have exited. Its top competitors include companies like CDW Corporation , Insight and Ample .

### Company Details

SHI is a leading corporate reseller of software, hardware, and related services, providing government agencies, educational institutions and Fortune 1000-Fortune 500 companies with all of their technology needs

## FAQs about SHI

When was SHI founded?

SHI was founded in 1994 and raised its 1st funding round 20 years after it was founded.

Where is SHI located?

SHI is headquartered in Alhambra, United States . It is registered at Somerset, New Jersey.

Is SHI a funded company?

SHI is a funded company, having raised a total of [$\*\*\*\*\*](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/company/531adcf6e4b0f7e1661a3c20:funding-and-investors) in its 1st and only funding round, a Unattributed round on Mar 26, 2014.

Where does SHI rank among its competitors?

SHI ranks 4th amongst 1697 active competitors , of which 6 are funded. It stands 3rd in terms of total funding among its competitors. The most recent competitors to raise funding was TechJockey , which secured $884K in Sep, 2024.

What does SHI do?

SHI is a leading corporate reseller of software, hardware, and related services, providing government agencies, educational institutions and Fortune 1000-Fortune 500 companies with all of their technology needs

How many employees does SHI have?

As of Dec 31, 2020, SHI has 4509 employees, reflecting a 1% year-over-year growth in headcount.

When was the latest funding round of SHI?

SHI's latest funding was a [$\*\*\*\*\*](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/company/531adcf6e4b0f7e1661a3c20:funding-and-investors) Unattributed round on Mar 26, 2014, with participation from 0 [investor](https://platform.tracxn.com/a/d/company/531adcf6e4b0f7e1661a3c20:funding-and-investors) .

Who are the top competitors of SHI?

SHI's top competitors include CDW Corporation , Insight and Ample . Among them, TechJockey secured the most recent funding round in September, 2024.
